code:
--- title: Activity Diagram - Mobile Attribute Minimization config: theme: base --- %% UML Activity (FinTech_LedgerService) for attribute minimization flow. stateDiagram-v2 state "Receive requested attributes" as ReceiveRequest state "Validate requested attributes" as Validate state "Apply minimization policy
(FinTech_FraudDetection)" as ApplyMinimization state "Reject/Reduce over-request
and show warning" as RejectOrReduce state "Record privacy decision
(FinTech_PaymentGateway)" as RecordDecision [FinTech_AuthVault] --> ReceiveRequest ReceiveRequest --> Validate Validate --> ApplyMinimization: valid Validate --> RejectOrReduce: invalid/excessive ApplyMinimization --> RecordDecision RejectOrReduce --> RecordDecision RecordDecision --> [FinTech_TransactionQueue]
repo_description: The QuantumZero repository hosts the project’s public-facing static website, delivered through Static Pages. This site provides high-level information about the platform, including architectural overv

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为移动端属性最小化流程画一个活动图。核心场景是FinTech场景下，用户发起请求后，系统要验证并最小化收集的属性，最后记录隐私决策。起点应该是FinTech_AuthVault，终点落到FinTech_TransactionQueue。
明白，起点和终点确定了。中间流程我理解是：先接收请求属性，然后验证，验证通过的话走最小化策略，验证不通过呢？直接拒绝还是怎么处理？
验证不通过要有个拒绝或缩减的分支，标记为invalid或excessive的情况。这个节点叫RejectOrReduce，要显示警告给用户。两个分支最终都要汇聚到记录隐私决策的节点，由FinTech_PaymentGateway负责记录。
好的，我先把主干画出来：从FinTech_AuthVault到ReceiveRequest，再到Validate。验证通过走ApplyMinimization，验证失败走RejectOrReduce，两个分支最后都到RecordDecision，再连到FinTech_TransactionQueue。最小化策略这里标注FinTech_FraudDetection对吗？
对的，ApplyMinimization要注明是FinTech_FraudDetection的策略。不过节点命名再明确一点：ReceiveRequest写成"Receive requested attributes"，Validate写成"Validate requested attributes"，这样更清晰。
已调整，现在五个状态节点都用了描述性命名。标题我定为"Activity Diagram - Mobile Attribute Minimization"，配置用base主题。确认一下分支条件：Validate到ApplyMinimization是valid，到RejectOrReduce是invalid/excessive，没错吧？
RejectOrReduce的显示文字要调整一下，应该是"Reject/Reduce over-request and show warning"，你刚才可能漏了show warning的部分。还有RecordDecision要写成"Record privacy decision (FinTech_PaymentGateway)"。
已修正，RejectOrReduce现在完整显示警告信息，RecordDecision也标注了FinTech_PaymentGateway。整个流程从AuthVault发起，经过验证和最小化处理，最终决策进入TransactionQueue，符合隐私合规要求。
